shellCommands.command: cd /home/user/workspace && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200
cd /home/user/workspace && cat package.json && printf '\n---\n' && find . -maxdepth 3 -name 'run.py' -o -name '*.py' | sed 's#^./##' | sort
cd /home/user/workspace && ls -la && printf '\n---\n' && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | grep -E '(^|/)run\.py$|(^|/)tests?/|\.py$|README|AGENTS'
cd /home/user/workspace && cat README.md && printf '\n---AGENTS---\n' && cat AGENTS.md

cd /home/user/workspace && python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('run.py')
print(p.read_text())
PY
python3 -m pytest tests/test_outputs.py -rA

cd /home/user/workspace && python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from run import run_tasks

async def main():
    async def a():
        try:
            await asyncio.sleep(0.1)
        finally:
            print('cleanup a')
    async def b():
        try:
            await asyncio.sleep(0.2)
        finally:
            print('cleanup b')
    t = asyncio.create_task(run_tasks([a,b], 1))
    await asyncio.sleep(0.05)
    t.cancel()
    try:
        await t
    except asyncio.CancelledError:
        print('cancelled')

asyncio.run(main())
PY
python3 -m py_compile run.py && echo OK

cd /home/user/workspace && python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('package.json')
print(p.read_text())
PY
